allow: PowerShell(curl.exe -s -L -m 30 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/125.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept-Language: he-IL,he;q=0.9,en;q=0.5" "https://mazkeka.com/events/" -o "$env:TEMP\\mazkeka.html"; \(Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\mazkeka.html"\).Length)

PowerShell(foreach \($site in "mazkeka.com","radical.org.il","matmon.space"\) { $r = curl.exe -s -m 20 "https://$site/wp-json/wp/v2/types"; $j = $r | ConvertFrom-Json; "=== $site"; $j.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { "  type: $\($_.Name\)  rest_base: $\($_.Value.rest_base\)" } })
